backendUrl.description: ClawGuard backend URL configured through OpenClaw plugin config.

apiKey.description: ClawGuard API key configured through OpenClaw plugin config.

captureFullIo.description: Capture full tool input/output instead of summaries.

maxFullIoBytes.description: Maximum bytes captured when full I/O capture is enabled.

blockSensitiveAccess.description: Block access to sensitive files (.env, credentials, SSH keys).

requireApprovalForHighRisk.description: Require user approval before potential data exfiltration.

batchSize.description: Number of events to buffer before flushing.

flushIntervalMs.description: Maximum time in milliseconds before buffered events are flushed.
